description_long: This is a large, freestanding entertainment or storage unit made primarily of light-colored wood. The front features multiple open shelves on both sides, two lower cabinets with doors, and a wide central space likely intended for a television or display. There are also two drawers at the bottom center, each with a visible handle, and the shelving is supported by vertical dividers and metallic rods. The back is flat and unadorned, while the sides are solid panels with the depth of the unit clearly visible. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for living rooms, offices, or public waiting areas.
description: A large, light-wood entertainment or storage unit with open shelves, cabinets, and drawers, designed for modern urban interiors.
description_view_0: Side view showing the solid wood panel and the depth of the unit, with drawers and shelves slightly visible.
description_view_1: Front view displaying open shelves, two lower cabinets with doors, a central open space, and two drawers with handles.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the solid panel and the depth of the unit.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a flat, unadorned wood panel with the back of the shelves and drawers not visible.
